function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the web for current, real-time information. Returns clean, token-efficient text from top results. Use for: news, prices, facts, recent events.

query.description: Search query — be specific for best results

max_results.description: Number of web pages to fetch (1–10, default 3)

function.name: web_fetch
function.description: Fetch and read a specific URL. Supports JavaScript-heavy sites (Yahoo Finance, TradingView), PDFs, and most websites. Returns clean, token-efficient content.

url.description: Full URL to fetch (http/https). Supports JS-heavy sites and PDFs.

query.description: Optional focus topic — extracts content most relevant to this

function.name: deep_research
function.description: Multi-angle deep research on a topic. Generates multiple sub-queries, fetches and synthesizes results from several sources. Use for complex questions that need breadth.

topic.description: Research topic — will be split into multiple sub-queries for depth
